case_title: YEMISI NICOLE OMOLAYOLE VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT FROM JUL-02-2012 AT 5:30 PM TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JUL-02-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-02-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-25-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,892.00 FILED BY OMOLAYOLE, YEMISI NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OMOLAYOLE, YEMISI NICOLE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OMOLAYOLE, YEMISI NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $2,914.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,024.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $1,000 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CC 1950.5 (C). DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,694 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT AS PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED THAT AMOUNT FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF OMOLAYOLE, YEMISI NICOLE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAY-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
